title: echinodorus cordifolius subsp. fluitans
intro: Echinodorus cordifolius subsp. fluitans, also known as the 'Fluitans' or 'Lilyturf', is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Alismataceae. It is a submerged aquatic plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinodorus cordifolius subsp. fluitans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it can be found in tea, infusion, or dried form, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
